recentWorkouts.notes: Completed 5 exercises. Squat volume increased by 5%.
Struggled with final set of overhead press. Adjusted weight down.
Strong session. All sets completed at target weight.
Form check requested on deadlift. Good progress on rows.

u-client-1.notes: Responding well to increased volume on leg days. Monitor lower back fatigue during Pull Day B. Suggested deload in W5.

u-client-2.notes: Strength gains are consistent. Bench press stalling — consider periodization change.

u-client-3.notes: Good adherence to nutrition plan. Cardio sessions on off-days are helping recovery.

u-client-4.notes: Volume PRs consistently. Consider reducing accessory work to avoid overtraining.
